records.ety: [F. apparition, L. apparitio, fr. apparere. See Appear.]

defs: The act of becoming visible; appearance; visibility.
quotes: The sudden apparition of the Spaniards.
The apparition of Lawyer Clippurse occasioned much speculation in that portion of the world.

defs: The thing appearing; a visible object; a form.
quotes: Which apparition, it seems, was you.

defs: An unexpected, wonderful, or preternatural appearance; a ghost; a specter; a phantom.
quotes: I think it is the weakness of mine eyes That shapes this monstrous apparition.

defs: The first appearance of a star or other luminary after having been invisible or obscured; -- opposed to occultation.
